Module chariot
Package chariot.model

Record Class User

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
chariot.model.User
Record Components:
id - The user id (Username in lowercase)
username - The username
All Implemented Interfaces:
Model
public record User(String id, String username, String url, boolean disabled, boolean closed, boolean tosViolation, boolean booster, boolean patron, boolean streaming, boolean followable, boolean following, boolean blocking, boolean followsYou, boolean verified, Optional<String> title, Optional<String> playing, Optional<User.Profile> profile, List<Trophy> trophies, Long createdAt, Long seenAt, User.PlayTime playTime, User.Count count, User.Perfs perfs) extends Record implements Model

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String id, String username, String url, boolean disabled, boolean closed, boolean tosViolation, boolean booster, boolean patron, boolean streaming, boolean followable, boolean following, boolean blocking, boolean followsYou, boolean verified, Optional<String> title, Optional<String> playing, Optional<User.Profile> profile, List<Trophy> trophies, Long createdAt, Long seenAt, User.PlayTime playTime, User.Count count, User.Perfs perfs)
      Creates an instance of a User record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      username - the value for the username record component
      url - the value for the url record component
      disabled - the value for the disabled record component
      closed - the value for the closed record component
      tosViolation - the value for the tosViolation record component
      booster - the value for the booster record component
      patron - the value for the patron record component
      streaming - the value for the streaming record component
      followable - the value for the followable record component
      following - the value for the following record component
      blocking - the value for the blocking record component
      followsYou - the value for the followsYou record component
      verified - the value for the verified record component
      title - the value for the title record component
      playing - the value for the playing record component
      profile - the value for the profile record component
      trophies - the value for the trophies record component
      createdAt - the value for the createdAt record component
      seenAt - the value for the seenAt record component
      playTime - the value for the playTime record component
      count - the value for the count record component
      perfs - the value for the perfs record component

  • Method Details

    • createdTime

      public ZonedDateTime createdTime()

    • seenTime

      public ZonedDateTime seenTime()

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
